summary: Comprehensive testing of Settlement Approval Workflow and Treasury History features completed. All 13 backend tests passed. UI testing confirmed Approvals page with Transactions/Settlements tabs, Treasury history dialog with date/type filters and download statement, and vendor settlement workflow.

issues: Console warning: Missing Description or aria-describedby for DialogContent - accessibility improvement (non-blocking)
Console warning: Chart width/height -1 on initial load - recharts library issue (non-blocking)

passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/settlements/pending - Returns pending vendor settlements
Backend: POST /api/vendors/{vendor_id}/settle - Settlement created with status 'pending'
Backend: POST /api/settlements/{id}/approve - Approves settlement and updates treasury
Backend: POST /api/settlements/{id}/reject - Rejects settlement with reason
Backend: GET /api/treasury - Returns treasury accounts with balance_usd
Backend: GET /api/treasury/{id}/history - Returns transaction history
Backend: GET /api/treasury/{id}/history?start_date=X - Date filter works
Backend: GET /api/treasury/{id}/history?end_date=X - Date filter works
Backend: GET /api/treasury/{id}/history?transaction_type=deposit - Type filter works
Backend: GET /api/treasury/{id}/history (invalid account) - Returns 404
Backend: Accountant can access pending settlements endpoint
Backend: GET /api/transactions/pending - Returns pending transactions for approval
Frontend: Approvals page loads with PENDING TRANSACTIONS and PENDING SETTLEMENTS stats
Frontend: Approvals page has two tabs - Transactions and Settlements
Frontend: Transactions tab shows pending transactions with Approve/Reject buttons
Frontend: Approve button triggers math captcha verification dialog
Frontend: Captcha dialog shows random math problem (X + Y = ?)
Frontend: Reject button opens rejection reason dialog
Frontend: View button opens transaction details dialog
Frontend: Settlements tab shows 'All caught up!' when no pending settlements
Frontend: Treasury page View History button opens history dialog
Frontend: Treasury history dialog has Start Date filter
Frontend: Treasury history dialog has End Date filter
Frontend: Treasury history dialog has Type filter (All Types, Deposit, Withdrawal, Settlement In)
Frontend: Treasury history dialog has Download Statement button
Frontend: Treasury history shows Date, Type, Reference, Amount columns
Frontend: Vendors page shows vendor cards with Pending amount
critical_code_review_comments: Exchange rates to USD are hardcoded in backend (EXCHANGE_RATES_TO_USD) - should use live API in production
Missing aria-describedby on DialogContent components - accessibility improvement
seed_data_creation: Using existing seeded data from previous iterations
context_for_next_testing_agent: Settlement Approval Workflow fully tested. Vendor settlements go to 'pending' status first, then appear in Approvals page Settlements tab. Accountant/Admin can approve/reject with math captcha verification. Treasury history endpoint supports date (start_date, end_date) and transaction_type filters. Download Statement generates CSV file.

settlement_approval_workflow.settlements_pending_endpoint: Working - GET /api/settlements/pending returns vendor settlements awaiting approval
settlement_approval_workflow.settlement_goes_to_pending: Working - POST /api/vendors/{id}/settle creates settlement with status='pending'

approvals_page_ui.transactions_tab: Working - Shows pending transactions with Approve/Reject
approvals_page_ui.settlements_tab: Working - Shows pending vendor settlements (or empty state)
approvals_page_ui.reject_with_reason: Working - Dialog prompts for rejection reason

treasury_history.date_filters: Working - start_date and end_date query params
treasury_history.history_dialog_ui: Working - Shows filters and transaction list
